title: Money for nothing?
relevance_summary: Fat-finger error leading to MEV exploitation

prevention.rule: Block any tx that shows signs of adding liquidity at an out-of-range price point followed by a quick withdrawal.

red_flags: Quick withdrawal of a small amount relative to the added liquidity
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that shows signs of adding liquidity at an out-of-range price point followed by a quick withdrawal.
summary: Aavebank.eth made a fat-finger error by adding liquidity at an out-of-range price point on Uniswap V3, which was quickly exploited by an MEV bot, resulting in significant funds loss.
